name: skool-view
description: A custom, local-first browser-extension client for Skool communities (Firefox first).

scripts.package: npm run build && web-ext build -s dist -a web-ext-artifacts --overwrite-dest
scripts.package:chrome: npm run build:chrome && web-ext build -s dist -a web-ext-artifacts --overwrite-dest --filename "skool-view-chrome-{version}.zip"
scripts.sign: npm run build && web-ext sign -s dist -a web-ext-artifacts --channel=unlisted
